title: Exactly what I want — Emily wishlist (intimate, explicit, Austin-grounded)
html:
Exactly what I want — Emily wishlist (intimate, explicit, Austin-grounded)

Source: 2025-10-28 Apple Note. The first appearance of Emily by name — Yahir's longing-list for the relationship he wants with her, written in Austin just over a month into living there. Mostly explicit/intimate, anchored by deeply ordinary domestic flashes.

TL;DR

  • Emily Stevens (named explicitly) — the relationship Yahir is pursuing/imagining when he writes this list.
  • Mix of Austin-specific date ideas (sushi date, movie theatre, walk along the boardwalk at sunset and cider, Best Sushi in Austin guide link) and domestic flashes (Miller High Life case in the fridge, one nice candle lit, fruits to snack on, beautiful home-cooked Emily dinner with shared bottle of wine, cortado date "thinking about nothing except the moment we are sharing").
  • Many explicit sexual fantasies — sex in every room, mirror sex, outdoor-by-water sex. (Treating these as private; not surfacing in the graph beyond noting they exist.)
  • The cortado bullet is the tell: "cortado date with emily thinking about nothing except the moment we are sharing" — what he actually wants is presence, not novelty.
  • Reappears nearly verbatim in the Nov 7 visit planning doc — same wishlist embedded in the visit itinerary.

Pattern observed

First-named documentation of Emily Stevens in the corpus. Becomes a recurring reference in Nov 2025 visit prep, Feb 2026 issue brief, March visit, Spanish assignment help, the Rankett era. The Emily arc spans ~6+ months and is the major relationship of the post-China era.

The intimate list also serves as counter-evidence to the manifesto-Yahir voice: the list is private, embodied, present-tense desire — not legacy-talk.

Open questions

  • When did Yahir + Emily first meet? (Unknown from this note.)
  • Is Emily the U of Oregon FHS student in Eugene? (Per 2026 02 26 issue brief emily stevens, yes — long-distance Austin/Eugene.)
  • Does the alignment/misalignment list from March 2026 reference Emily? (Strongly likely — same period, "she" pronoun, the same girlfriend-evaluation context.)

Related

  • emily stevens
  • austin tx
  • 2025 11 07 when bros and emily come
  • 2026 02 26 issue brief emily stevens
  • 2026 03 24 alignment misalignment
  • the emily arc
